author: Netflix Anime
text:
Irresistible works from Kyoto Animation ✨
Can't wait for Sparks of Tomorrow to premiere on Netflix on July 5? Dive into some of Kyoto Animation's other immersive works in the meantime!

Regional availability may vary by title.

Violet Evergarden
https://www.netflix.com/VioletEvergarden

Sparks of Tomorrow
https://www.netflix.com/SparksofTomorrow 

Miss Kobayashi's Dragon Maid
https://www.netflix.com/title/80186349 

Tsurune
https://www.netflix.com/title/81416630 

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com

Subscribe: https://bit.ly/33okaL0

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time.
